message:
fix: thread safety, UTF-8 correctness, file close semantics, and multiple robustness improvements

Thread safety (pkg/debug, pkg/metrics):
- Convert debug.enabled from bare bool to atomic.Bool for safe concurrent
  reads/writes across goroutines. Add sync.Mutex-protected getLogger() to
  guard lazy logger initialization. All call sites (Log, LogTiming, LogIf,
  LogFunc, LogEnterExit, Dump, Section, Checkpoint, Assert, AssertNoError)
  now use enabled.Load() and nil-check the logger before calling methods.
- Convert checkpointCounter from bare int to atomic.Int64, using .Add(1)
  for increment and .Store(0) for reset.
- Convert metrics.enabled from bare bool to atomic.Bool with init() for
  env-var read. All call sites (Record, Timer, TimerWithCallback, Hit, Miss)
  now use enabled.Load().
- Update all tests in debug_test.go and metrics_test.go to use atomic
  Load/Store instead of direct field access.

UTF-8 / rune-safe string truncation (pkg/ui, pkg/correlation):
- Replace all byte-length truncation (len(s) > n / s[:n]) with rune-aware
  truncateRunesHelper() throughout the TUI rendering layer. This prevents
  mid-codepoint slicing that corrupts multi-byte characters (CJK, emoji,
  accented chars) in: bead titles, file tree names, commit messages, author
  names, detail panel info lines, git detail panels, label graph analysis,
  and CASS session modal snippets.
- Fix capitalizeFirst() in history.go to operate on runes instead of bytes,
  correctly capitalizing multi-byte first characters.
- Fix network.go generateClusterLabel to use []rune length check and slice
  to 27 runes (not 30 bytes) before appending "..." so the result stays
  within the 30-rune budget.

File close error handling (pkg/correlation, pkg/export):
- feedback.go Save(): Replace defer file.Close() with explicit close-after-
  write that checks and returns the close error. On marshal or write failure,
  close the file immediately before returning the error, preventing fd leaks
  on the error path.
- graph_snapshot.go renderSVG(): Replace defer file.Close() with explicit
  close that captures the error; if renderSVGToWriter succeeded but Close
  fails (e.g. fsync/disk-full), the close error is now propagated.

Sprint loader env-var awareness (pkg/loader):
- LoadSprints and SaveSprints now use GetBeadsDir() instead of hardcoding
  filepath.Join(repoPath, ".beads"), gaining automatic support for BEADS_DB,
  BEADS_DIR env vars and git worktree detection. Removes redundant os.Getwd
  fallback that GetBeadsDir already handles.

Search weight normalization (pkg/search):
- hybridScorer.Configure() now calls weights.Normalize() after Validate(),
  ensuring raw weights are normalized before use. Validation still runs on
  raw values first so negative weights are caught before normalization can
  mask them.

Dependency type method migration (pkg/export):
- graph_snapshot.go buildLayout(): Replace direct dep.Type != model.DepBlocks
  comparison with dep.Type.IsBlocking() method, consistent with the rest of
  the codebase's migration to the method-based API.

TUI bounds check (pkg/ui):
- actionable.go MoveUp(): Guard against empty track Items slice when moving
  to the previous track, setting selectedItem to 0 instead of -1 which would
  cause an index-out-of-range panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
